name: Softimat S.A.
summary: Softimat S.A. engages in the real estate business. It specializes in office and residential real estate activities. The company leases a property portfolio of office and industrial spaces to various tenants, as well as park consisting of eight buildings, including 13,000 square meters of offices, 2,500 square meters of technical laboratories, and 6,750 square meters of stocks in Belgium and Luxembourg. It also develops residential real estate projects. Softimat S.A. was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Lasne, Belgium.
